ops.body: Done. cc-skills b0cc0048f117 (ccx.md fragment: dep-reader in entry 12, ci-triage appended to entry 13, web-fetch/web-researcher paragraph after the CLI-only footnote, enumerator in the LSP paragraph) + b784ce836581 (self-source pin bump + render), both CI-green. cc-context re-rendered early via workflow_dispatch (run 29571330441 → commit d19b953d, pinned to b784ce836581); the other 30 consumers ride the daily guides cron per the pull-only policy. Note on the criterion wording: the web agents live in the web block (after the CLI-only footnote), not entries 12/13 — those entries carry dep-reader and ci-triage respectively.
